title: Quick Connect Toolbar not working anymore (v1.77.2)
author: fsolfsch
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
Quick Connect Toolbar not working anymore. I can't add it (just after restart the application), If its added, search history, create connection etc. not working and i can't move it to the first line next to the options menu
## Your Environment
<!--- Include as many relevant details about the environment you experienced the bug in -->
* Version used:
* Operating System and version (e.g. Windows 10 1709 x64):
v1.77.2 / Win11...

iterations.description: The Quick Connect Toolbar is reported as not working, indicating a functional regression that needs to be addressed.

comments.author: simonai1254
comments.snippet: See #2137, should be fixed with next release

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

notes:
AI triage (gemini): The Quick Connect Toolbar is reported as not working, indicating a functional regression that needs to be addressed.
Approach: Investigate initialization, event handling, and visibility logic of the Quick Connect Toolbar within `frmMain.cs` and `ViewMenu.cs`, specifically looking for regressions introduced in v1.77.2 that prevent the toolbar from appearing or functioning correctly.
